rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving first invalid reference on the same line or deleting the clause
Resolve 'Couldn't resolve reference to' errors by using only visible identifiers from current scope; do not invent new declarations
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when diagnostics point to subcomponent paths
Ensure AGREE expressions preserve type consistency: numeric vars get numeric exprs, Boolean vars get Boolean exprs
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers from the current component scope
Generated AGREE code should not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Repair diagnostics by aligning helper declarations with their referenced expressions' types
Do not add new architecture during repair; only fix existing contract expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts go in annex agree blocks; component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Helper functions and constants must be declared before use in the same annex
Property associations must reference valid model elements with matching types
Use only int, real, and bool as scalar types in AGREE declarations
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the model
Do not add new architecture or components during repair; only fix existing contract expressions
Do not assume that unresolved references can be fixed by adding missing declarations
Do not mix component type and implementation scope references in the same contract
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting component structure
